summary: The diff implements the vast majority of requirements for ConvertHub. All 8 tool components are present, the glassmorphism theme is implemented, hero/footer sections exist, and client-side processing is used throughout. A few specific acceptance criteria have gaps: PDF.js CDN usage for PDF tools is not clearly evidenced in the truncated diffs, Mammoth.js CDN usage for Word-to-PDF is not confirmed, a zip download option for PDF-to-Image is not visible, and the hero background image (REQ-14) is referenced but the image asset itself is a generated file not verifiable in the diff. Overall the implementation appears comprehensive with minor uncertainties due to file truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Provide a download for all converted images individually or as a zip
missing_requirements.reason: The PdfToImage tool file is not shown in the diff (omitted due to limits), so it cannot be confirmed that a zip download option is implemented for multiple pages.

missing_requirements.requirement: A decorative hero background or banner image is used in the hero area
missing_requirements.reason: The Hero component references /assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x600.png, but no image generation or asset file is included in the diff. The actual image asset is not present in the added files.

missing_requirements.requirement: A logo/wordmark image is rendered in the hero section
missing_requirements.reason: The Hero component references /assets/generated/converthub-logo.dim_256x256.png, but the actual generated image asset is not present among the added files in the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication integration (useInternetIdentity hook, InternetIdentityProvider, AuthClient setup)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists user authentication or login as a non-goal, yet a full Internet Identity provider and auth client hook are implemented and wrapped around the app.

hallucinated_features.description: Caffeine.ai referral link in the footer
hallucinated_features.reason: The footer includes a referral/attribution link to caffeine.ai, which was not requested in the build specification.
